title: OMG Second Impact has occured
wikitext:
[]: OMG, Second Impact has occured > . >             Quote Post by Kaworu Nagisa » Sun Aug 20, 2006 12:48 pm http://www.comcast.net/news/international/australia/index.jsp?cat=AUSTRALIA&fn=/2006/08/20/459239.html&cvqh=itn_quake ^ An "Earthquake". Sure.

[]: Re: OMG, Second Impact has occured > . >             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Aug 20, 2006 12:55 pm Kaworu Nagisa wrote: http://www.comcast.net/news/international/australia/index.jsp?cat=AUSTRALIA&fn=/2006/08/20/459239.html&cvqh=itn_quake ^ An "Earthquake". Sure.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Aug 20, 2006 1:32 pm I guess 2nd Impact was a few years late, but better late than never.

[]:             Quote Post by badc0de » Sun Aug 20, 2006 2:42 pm Oh, then Kaworu-kuns birthday will be 20th August? And we (I and other users of a german NGE-board ) were already planning a "Second Impact & Kaworus 6. birthday party" for 13th September (all the time from 13th September 12am GMT+13 to 14th September 12am GMT-12, so we could celebrate 49 hours! XD) (In case I fucked up the 12-hour-timeformat here is the 24-hour-timeformat: 13th September 0:00 GMT+13 to 13th September 24:00 GMT-12)

[]:             Quote Post by Darius » Sun Aug 20, 2006 6:48 pm Wait, second impact was on August 12th right? Cuz a lot fo weird events happened the night before for me...first, everytime my friend and I passed through the big lamp posts, they would shut off...like as soon was we were alligned with them.. Then there were multiple occasions where we saw people clad in black with a hat and the same distinguishing pink tie...one of them even followed us Now...it was as we were close to my house (it was already dark..*cries* lol) I realized that at the time it was the day before the second impact (so...if it was the 12th of august that it occured then thats a weird coincedence...and if it didnt happen on the 12th..it still is freaky!)

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sun Aug 20, 2006 7:59 pm Darius wrote: Wait, second impact was on August 12th right?

[]:             Quote Post by Darius » Sun Aug 20, 2006 8:12 pm Ah, ok thanks...But still..that as realllly weird..and it was an 11th...so ya.lol

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Mon Aug 21, 2006 8:30 pm Woah. September

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Aug 21, 2006 9:59 pm I really don't see how this is interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Aug 22, 2006 3:56 pm I am interested in the earthquakes part. But the rest of the babble is rather dry.

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Tue Aug 22, 2006 8:40 pm It IS kinda interesting actually, so...pretty soon we'll be seeing EVAs? I'm not coming back from Japan!!

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Fri Aug 25, 2006 11:52 pm Darius wrote: Then there were multiple occasions where we saw people clad in black with a hat and the same distinguishing pink tie...one of them even followed us
